nasb.text: And show you the secrets of wisdom! For sound wisdom has two sides. Know then that God forgets a part of your iniquity.

esv.text: and that he would tell you the secrets of wisdom! For he is manifold in understanding. Know then that God exacts of you less than your guilt deserves.

cnv.text: 把智慧的奧祕向你顯明， 因為真的智慧有兩面。 你當知道　神已忘記了你一部分的罪孽。

ccb.text: 告诉你智慧的奥秘， 因为真智慧深奥难懂。 要知道，上帝对你的惩罚比你该受的还轻。
